positive: A stylized cosmic tapestry featuring bioluminescent flora and celestial geometry. The central composition includes three interlocking, highly detailed mandala-like cosmic orbits forming a stylized, ethereal nebula. The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant sapphire blue, shimmering teal, and pops of bright neon coral and gold foil accents. Use strong, clean silhouettes and sharp, crisp lines with soft, glowing gradients for depth. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, resembling high-end apparel graphic design. Style: Art Deco meets Psychedelic Futurism, rendered with deep engraving and luminous glow effects. Studio quality, high contrast, vector art precision.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, messy, noisy, grainy, disfigured, poor anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, muted colors, photorealism
